summary: Classified the five open PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were found, and no close/merge/fix actions are recommended.

actions.reason: Independent draft PR with a proof blocker; keep open for author proof or maintainer triage rather than closing from this inventory shard.
This is an API/protocol compatibility decision with bot feedback claimed fixed by the author; it needs maintainer technical judgment or re-review, not backlog closeout.
New public session protocol behavior and a possible resolver defect require maintainer product and technical judgment before any mutation.
Independent docs/test PR with a clear branch-update blocker; it is not a duplicate, superseded, low-signal, or closure candidate.
Focused bug fix with proof and green checks, but merge/fix are blocked by this job and technical correctness is explicitly maintainer-gated.
